queries.question: Show the campus building and online platform ranked by the most highly subscribed lecture along with the lecture titles.
queries.sql:
SELECT v.name, p.platformName, 
             l.title as 'Lecture Title'
FROM Campus_Building v 
JOIN Lecture L on campusId = v.id JOIN Online_Platform P on L.onlineId = P.id
JOIN (SELECT
         COUNT(StudentId) as Attendance,
         lectureId
         FROM Enrollment
         GROUP BY lectureID) e ON e.lectureID = L.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): derived-table inner-join on Enrollment (Attendance unused) = lectures with >=1 e

queries.question: Show the venues ranked by the most highly subscribed lecture along with the lecture titles.
queries.sql:
SELECT v.name, 
             l.title as 'Lecture Title'
FROM Campus_Building v 
JOIN Lecture L on campusId = v.id
JOIN (SELECT
         COUNT(StudentId) as Attendance,
         lectureId
         FROM Enrollment
         GROUP BY lectureID) e ON e.lectureID = L.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): derived-table inner-join on Enrollment = lectures with enrollment; campus+title

queries.question: Show the venues ranked by the most highly subscribed lecture along with the lecture titles.
queries.sql:
SELECT v.platformName, 
             l.title as 'Lecture Title'
FROM Online_Platform v 
JOIN Lecture L on onlineId = v.id
JOIN (SELECT
         COUNT(StudentId) as Attendance,
         lectureId
         FROM Enrollment
         GROUP BY lectureID) e ON e.lectureID = L.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): derived-table inner-join on Enrollment = lectures with enrollment; platform+titl

queries.question: List the lectures and the campus buildings and/or online platforms they are hosted in.
queries.sql: SELECT v.name, p.platformName, title as 'Lecture Title' FROM Campus_Building v JOIN Lecture L on campusId = v.id JOIN Online_Platform P on L.onlineId = P.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): unqualified cols resolve to Lecture; campus+platform+title

queries.question: List the lectures and the online platforms they are hosted in.
queries.sql: SELECT v.platformName, title as 'Lecture Title' FROM Online_Platform v JOIN Lecture L on onlineId = v.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): unqualified cols resolve to Lecture; platform+title

queries.question: Where is each lecture held?
queries.sql: SELECT v.name, title as 'Lecture Title' FROM Campus_Building v JOIN Lecture L on campusId = v.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): unqualified cols resolve to Lecture; campus+title
